violations.text: The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by dead carcasses on glue monitoring traps. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to create an action plan to reduce/eliminate pest presence. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the large milk cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025
The freezer lid was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the milk cooler, and freezer. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The floors in the kitchen (behind equipment) cafeteria, and storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris pest droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrective action, establishment is to clean any and all droppings, establishment is to continue working with pest control and is to continue to monitor for pest activity. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
